title: 10th anniversary CD
wikitext:
[]: 10th anniversary CD             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Sep 06, 2005 3:00 am Yep, Gainax stealing again is taking out a new audio CD for the 10 anniversary conmemoration. It contains a new Yoko Takahashi song, which is the "anniversary" version of Zankoku na Tenshi no Te-ze. It says the CD will have 12 songs, although only 5 have been announced: 1) Zankoku na Tenshi no Te-ze 2) Fly me to the Moon 3) Tamashii no Rufuran 4) Thanatos - If I can't be yours - 5) Zankoku na Tenshi no Te-ze (10th Anniversary) Release date: Oct 26 (2005) http://www.gainax.co.jp/anime/eva/index.html#new050906 http://www2.gainax.co.jp/shop/list.cgi?genre=10 http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=KICA-718

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Tue Sep 06, 2005 11:18 pm I imagine the other seven tracks will be "Fly Me to the Moon" as well.
